technical_replicate: the variation in the absolute number of identified peptides between replicates was higher
experimental_design: we used IPTK to study the impact of the initial cell count on the HLA-DR immunopeptidome
factor_value: starting from two initial cell counts, 5 × 107 and 1 × 108 cells
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described
number_of_technical_replicates: the variation in the absolute number of identified peptides between replicates was higher
